name: citely-measurement-engine
description: Evidence-backed AI visibility audit operator and reliable measurement engine

scripts.demo: node src/citely.mjs audit --config examples/demo-audit.json --provider mock --out output/demo
scripts.check:phase1: node --check src/phase1-demo.mjs && find src/engine -name '*.mjs' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && node --test tests/phase1-engine.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check src/citely.mjs && node --check src/phase1-demo.mjs && find src/engine -name '*.mjs' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && node --test
